Skylety 6 Pieces Octopus Kite, Easy Flyer Kites with Long Tail, with a 100-meter Flying Line, Play with Kids on The Beach, Park, Outdoor Games and Activities
['Features: Applicable occasions: You can fly the colorful octopus kites with your children on the park, beach, and other outdoor places, which will bring your kids hours of fun and make you have a wonderful parent-child time. Moreover, it is also a nice choice to go kite-flying with friends. 6 Octopus kites: There are 6 colors in a set, including red, pink, blue, orange, purple, and green. The kite looks like a big octopus with colorful ribbons on its long tail, coming with a childlike facial expression to satisfy children’s innocence, and various colors make it fly in the sky beautifully. Specifications: Color: red, pink, blue, orange, purple, and green. Material: plain cloth Size: about 25.6 x 157.5 inches Property: the kite is light in weight, durable, and sewn firmly. Package includes: 6 x Octopus Kites 6 x 100-Meter flying line 1 x English instruction sheet Notes: Kite flying generally requires windy weather, but the wind can sometimes become strong. The higher the wind is, the kite will be difficult to control. At this time, the line must be taken up in time to reduce the height of the kite. Please allow slight deviation in size due to manual measurement. Please allow slight color differences due to different monitors and light effects.']
['Octopus kites set: there are 6 colors in a set, including red, pink, blue, orange, purple, and green; The kite looks like a big octopus with colorful ribbons on its long tail, coming with a childlike facial expression to satisfy children’s innocence, and various colors make it fly in the sky beautifully', 'Size and Material: each octopus kite is about 25.6 x 157.5 inches, large enough to be spotted, easy for you to control the kite even in the distance; The kite is made of plain cloth, safe and durable, not easy to break or bend in the winds', 'Easy to use: the big octopus kite is soft without frame, so you needn’t assemble, just take it from the bag and then start to enjoy flying the kite; There are 3 air inlets on the kite, making it easier for you to fly the kite, and it will be more three-dimensional when the octopus is flying; It can also be folded and portable', 'Package includes: you can get 6 octopus kites in different colors, so you can have a flying kite competition with your family and friends; Each kite is equipped with a 100-meter kite string, which can make your kite fly farther; There is also an English instruction sheet to help you fly the kite successfully', 'Have a happy leisure time: the huge octopus kite is easy to play, suitable for children and adults; Enjoy playing kites with your family, and have a happy family time at the beach, park, outdoors or any open area']

['Blast into big fun with the Nerf microshots series of collectible, mini-sized Nerf toy blasters! Nerf microshots series blasters capture the iconic look of the original blasters but in a scrunched-down style All their own. Their look and size makes them collectible additions to any Nerf collection. This Nerf microshots Fortnite micro hc-r blaster is inspired by the hand cannon used in the popular Fortnite battle Royale video game. It includes 2 official Nerf elite darts and fires 1 dart at a time with hand-powered action (no batteries required). Load 1 dart into the front of the blaster, pull down the handle to prime, and pull the trigger to fire. Look for all the microscopes series of micro-sized blasters for collecting and playing (each sold separately).']

Transformers Prime Voyager Beast Ultra Magnus
['Product Description', 'The Elite Autobot special forces commander is ready to bring the battle to the Predacons with the mighty Forge of Solus battle hammer. Predacons beware, because this Ultra Magnus figure is just the Autobot to take any of them on! He’s a Special Forces commander with a mighty Forge of Solus battle hammer to use against his Predacon enemies, and his flip-down missile-firing launchers will make his enemies think twice before taking him on. Convert him to truck mode when he needs to make a fast escape or chase down his Predacon foes. Keep converting him back and forth so his Predacon enemies can’t keep up with him! Transformers and all related characters are trademarks of Hasbro.', 'From the Manufacturer', 'Welcome to the incredible world of Transformers robots. It is a world of high technology, ancient history and a battle that has spanned the entire galaxy and millions of years. Optimus Prime, leader of the heroic Autobots, battles the tyrant Megatron and his evil Decepticons for the fate of freedom across the universe. There is a Transformers figure for every kid or collector. From big converting figures to miniature battling robots, you can team up with Transformers toys to create your own incredible adventures. Whether you are defending Earth with the Autobots or conquering space with the Decepticons, the action is up to you. Transformers is a world-famous entertainment brand with 30 years of history, blockbuster movies, hit television shows and countless novels and comic books. With Transformers toys, you can create your own chapters in this epic, ongoing story. Transformers and all related characters are trademarks of Hasbro.']

["The heroic expedition of the Trail of Discovery was led by Captain Meriwether Lewis and Captain William Clark. Thirty three people traveled with them into unknown territory, starting near what is now known as Wood River, Illinois in 1804, reaching the Pacific Ocean in 1805 and returning in 1806. It is approximately 3,700 miles long, beginning near Wood River, Illinois, and passes through portions of Missouri, Kansas, Iowa, Nebraska, South Dakota, North Dakota, Montana, Idaho, Oregon, and Washington. Today, follow their route from the comfort of your armchair with a View-Master viewer and reels. There are 4 3-reel sets available with 84 photos in 3D. Set 2 of 4 different sets chronicling the Lewis & Clark Trail of Discovery Images from Fort Mandan to Lemhi Pass, Continental Divide - April 7, 1804 to August 12, 1805 Images are: * Fort Union Trading Post * Confluence of Missouri/Yellowstone Rivers * White Cliffs, Upper Missouri * Lewis climbed 300 ft to vantage point * Decision Point * Fort Benton * Statues * Bend of the Missouri * Great Falls/Ryan Dam * Giant Springs * Lewis & Clark Intrepretive Center * Exhibit depicts the struggle to portage a heavily laden canoe * Gates of the Rocky Mountains * Sheer rock cliffs * Three forks of Missouri * Beaverhead Rock * Clark's Lookout State Park, MT * Camp Fortunate * Waters of mighty Missouri * Lemhi Pass/Continental Divide * Agency Creek"]

['A music stand light with twin heads that can turn on and off separately, are independently flexible, and each contain four long-lasting LEDs. The twin-headed music stand light is a fresh design in the Koenig & Meyer lighting product range. The two, extremely flexible goosenecks produce a choice of very focused or very flat light based on whichever you require at each sitting. Each head contains a quadruple pack of LEDs, which can be switched on independently. The latest LED light technology guarantees a bright source of light with a long-lasting lifetime and minimal energy consumption. A handy clip means the light can be attached to music stands or boards with a maximum thickness of 0.78" (20 mm). The music stand light comes with a detachable power unit and a 9.8\'-long cable. The whole unit is compact at 6-1/2" x 4" x 2-1/4" when folded and is lightweight at less than half a pound.']

Dirty Dog Tavern Puzzle
['Our collection of puzzles is based on the types of diversions made by blacksmiths in earlier centuries. We call them Tavern Puzzles because they often turned up in country inns and taverns, the community gathering places in American towns, in days gone by. Did blacksmiths have a special fondness for puzzles? Maybe. What is more likely is that making a puzzle was a task that was used as a forging exercise for apprentice blacksmiths. The apprentice could learn techniques for making an eye, a twist, and precision bending in a simple puzzle design like the Iron Heart. After the master was satisfied with the apprentice’s skill in producing nails, the young apprentice might put together a brainteaser like the Patience Puzzle. Each puzzle is mechanical in nature: you do not need to use any force or tricks. Puzzles are solved when the object piece is removed. Every puzzle can be considered two puzzles in one, because the solution is not truly mastered until the object piece is returned to its starting point. Literature included with each puzzle shows the puzzle in its starting position and indicates the object piece, as well as how the puzzle looks when it is displayed. Tavern Puzzles are made from mild steel, similar to iron. They will develop a beautiful patina through use and handling. The more you play with your puzzle, the more attractive it will become. Steel rusts if it is exposed to moisture, or stored under damp conditions. If your puzzle will not be handled for a period of time, a light application of furniture polish will keep it in good condition. With a little care, your Tavern Puzzle will become an heirloom!']
['Category: Difficult. Objective: Remove shuttle.', 'This puzzle stumped a former US president!', 'Handcrafted in the USA. Made from 6mm steel. Comes in cloth bag, with information sheet. Good choice for someone with some puzzle experience.']

JOYO JF-07 Classic Flanger Metallic Flange Sounds Guitar Effect Pedal - True Bypass, DC 9V and Battery Supported
['What is better than a lead guitar solo with a nice guitar ran through a nice warm tube amp? The same solo played by David Gilmore; but more importantly for you is the same guitar solo played through a Joyo Flanger! This “Classic Flanger” pedal brings to mind the 70s rock era, with originality shining (instead of production methods).The JF-07 Classic flanger might as well be called the “007” pedal because it’s as stealthy and intriguing as Agent Bond himself. The control layout is reminiscent of your manager at work (that one may go above most of your heads, unless you really have an eye for simile, word play, or can think of a classic purple stompbox that brought this sound into everyone’s practice spaces).Featuring true bypass wiring, knobs to control Regen (how much feedback the pedal throws into the mix), Delay time (obvious enough, the speed of the swirl), width (also plays significantly with the modulation, basically affecting how far the flanger goes away from unmodulated or clean) and finally speed (also impacts swirliness and overall, controls the wobble).The JF-07 pedal is an affordable but highly effective pedal, and as such it allows any guitar player, beginner intermediate or expert, to dive in (deep) and begin experimenting with the headspace that is Sound. Do not operate heavy machinery while swirling around and getting lost in the lush tones this pedal can provide!']
['Uses the BBD simulation circuit', 'It is a nice warm tube amp', 'Affordable but highly effective pedal', 'Featuring true bypass wiring and knobs to control Regen', 'Can easily get the metallic flanger tone, wave-like chorus and a rapid tremulous vibrato']

Samson Airline 77 AH7 Fitness Headset Wireless System (Channel K3)
["Samson AirLine 77 AH7 Fitness Headset system is a wireless microphone solution designed to meet the specific demands of fitness instructors and active performers. With the unique AH7 micro transmitter mounted to a sweat-resistant Qe fitness headset microphone, you can free yourself completely from cables and belt packs, ideal for aerobics, yoga, spin, zumba, boot camp, boxing and kickboxing classes for a truly exhilarating and motivating experience. This allows you to focus on your class or performance, and not have to worry about your audio. The AH7 micro transmitter is mounted directly on the headset. This is unique when compared to traditional wireless systems that typically use a belt pack with a wire running from the microphone to the transmitter. The transmitter operates for up to eight hours straight on a single AAA battery. The Samson Qe condenser microphone, whose sweat-resistant capsule prevents corrosion from moisture and sweat. The bidirectional pickup pattern reduces background noise, minimizes feedback problems and effectively rejects signals not originating directly in front of the mic capsule. The CR77 True Diversity receiver provides reliable performance with up to 300' (90m) of wireless operation. The rear panel features balanced XLR and unbalanced 1/4 outputs allowing it to easily integrate to any audio system. Its half-rack housing is light enough to throw in your bag, or it can be permanently installed with a rackmount kit (sold separately)."]

['Description of RMC-XLR: The Rockville RMC-XLR is the same exact microphone we use in our Pro Mic Kit 1 microphone/stand bundle. This mic was created because we saw a need in the market for a high quality microphone at an affordable price. We found there were a lot of good mics around from reputable brands that sound great, but are very expensive. When we looked at the cheaper mics on the market from both reputable and entry level brands; we were not impressed at all. As a result we sent our very own product developers on a mic testing journey. A lot of our employees here at Rockville love to do karaoke, so it was not long before we found a mic that we all loved.. . You may be asking yourselves, so what makes this mic sound so good? There are 3 main components that make a mic sound the way it does. The cartridge, the magnet, and the mic cable. Our mic uses an M-56 cartridge which has a neodymium magnet. This combination of components supplies better sensitivity; which means your mouth will not have to be on the mic for it to pick up the sound. Our components supply more than a great pickup pattern. They have very little background noise, and great tone.']

AMIGO Take 5: Two Games in One – U.S. Version of 6 Nimmt! with Take A Number (X Nimmt!) Included, Yellow/Red
['With just two rules for how to play your cards, These internationally-recognized strategy card games are easy to learn, have remarkable turnarounds, and plenty of chances to wreak extreme havoc on your fellow players. Secretly pick a card from your hand, then play it on one of four rows. here are the two rules: your card must be higher than the last card in a row, and it has to be played next to the last card that\'s closest in Number. If you play the sixth card in a row, you take that row. . . . And all the points in it. That\'s when the game earns its name, as you\'re forced to "take five" Cards. take a number is a stand-alone game with advanced rules that builds on the basic edition to create an extreme “take” experience: the number of cards in each row varies, you\'ll get the chance to create your own row, and you can add cards back into your hand. Take 5 is the same as the German game 6 Nimmt! And take a number is the same as X Nimmt! .']

If you play the sixth card, you take that row and all the points in it. That\'s when the game earns its name, as you\'re forced to "take five" cards. Take a Number is a stand-alone game with advanced rules that builds on the basic edition to create an extreme “take” experience: the number of cards in each row varies, you can create your own row, and add cards back into your hand.', ': 104 “Take 5” Cards, 100 “Take a Number” Cards, 7 Row Cards, Illustrated Instructions for both games', 'EASY TO LEARN: Brief how-to-play videos available online']

Jackson Audio Blossom Optical Compressor Guitar Effects Pedal (JCKBLOSSOM)
['As a compressor, the BLOSSOM features an optical limiting circuit that takes its inspiration from compressors designed during the golden age of vacuum tube circuits. Optical compressors as they are called, are known for their transparency and subtlety. While the BLOSSOM can provide a very aggressive response at more extreme compression settings, its real strength lies in its ability to add a gentle sweetening and roundness to the tone as the optical circuit works to polish off any rough edges in the sound. Because of its natural and touch responsive bloom, the BLOSSOM is ideal for players who typically don’t use compression but want the ‘mastered’ response that optical compression gives a guitarists tone. The frequency response of the compressor section is flat as a board and does not boost or cut any of your highs or lows. Just like a well-designed compressor should, the BLOSSOM alters the dynamics of the guitar signal and not the tone. A good compressor should be felt and not heard!']
['Volume Control - Acts as a master volume for the ', 'EQ Control - When the EQ control is set at the 12: 00 position, the tone of the  is totally flat; Clockwise - treble frequencies are increased and the bass frequencies are decreased; Counter-clockwise - treble frequencies are decreased and the bass frequencies are increased', 'Comp Control - Turn clockwise for more compression. Balance this with the BLEND and VOLUME control', 'Mix Control - Allows you to blend in your clean uncompressed signal with the compressed signal', 'Can safely run from 9V-18V DC (center negative)']

COBI WWII Planes P-51D Mustang
['The Mustang P-51D is a unique model with a historic legend behind it. The set features the proper names of the plane printed on the nose, "Mary Rose" and "The Kelly Kid 2", the historical number 414 207 on the vertical stabilizer and the USAF markings. The appearance of the plane is inspired by the machine flown by the ace pilot Eugene W. James! Build a beautiful Mustang in a 1:32 scale model. The model was faithfully reproduced from 304 COBI construction blocks. The set includes high-quality prints only. The model is equipped with rotating propellers, lockable landing gear, movable wheels and an opening pilot\'s cockpit, in which you can place our figure inspired by the historic pilot. The set also includes a block display stand on which you can display your model and a plate with the name of the plane. The historic COBI set will also surely satisfy everyone, regardless of the age of fans of military technology, aviation and building blocks. The North American P-51 Mustang was an American single-engine WWII fighter. It was manufactured at the North American Aviation plants in the USA. The Mustang was successfully used by the US Air Force and its allies during World War II and the Korean War. A very successful design from 1940 meant that the plane was constantly manufactured until 1986! During 46 years approximately 15 to 16 thousand were built. Today, many of these machines are privately owned. Mustangs are now enthusiastically used in demonstration flights and sports competitions.']

['The Audio2000\'S  is a dual-channel wireless system with two wireless body-pack transmitters, two lavalier microphones, and two headset microphones. The wireless receiver of the  system is configured to be powered by either a 120VAC power source or by AA batteries. With the wireless receiver powered by AA batteries, this  wireless system is enabled to be used in an environment without the 120V AC outlet, such as the outdoor applications. The included wireless transmitters operate in two different UHF bands to be used by two users simultaneously in the applications of news reporter, PA speaker, YouTube, podcast, video recording, conference, Vlogging, interview, stage & sound, and teach. The dual-channel wireless receiver includes one 3.5mm AUX output jack, audio output level H/L selection switch, two XLR independent output jacks, one 1/4" mixed output jack, two independent volume control knobs (one for each channel), one headphone output jack, one headphone level control knob, one power On/Off switch, one power LED indicator, one battery LED indicator, one infrared sync window, one LCD display, and three buttons for each channel to control the frequencies and squelch level.']
['Consumer Alert: Most users do not need a license to operate this wireless microphone system. Nevertheless, operating this microphone system without a license is subject to certain restrictions: the system may not cause harmful interference; it must operate at a low power level (not in excess of 50 milliwatts); and it has no protection from interference received from any other device.']

['Quick Overview The Dayton Audio DS175-PR 6-1/2" passive radiator is excellent general-purpose radiator which allows lower tuning frequencies in smaller enclosures, suitable for replacement or for new construction. Product Highlights Long-throw suspension system for clean excursion Rugged stamped frame design with rear spider for stability Coated paper cone and rubber surround Product Manuals / Spec Sheets / Downloads AddThis Sharing Buttons Share to FacebookFacebook Share to TwitterTwitter Share to MoreAddThis 6 Product Description The Dayton Audio DS175-PR 6-1/2" passive radiator is an excellent general-purpose radiator suitable for replacement or for new construction. A built-in mass disc offers a good starting point for most designs, and a convenient M5 threaded hole (screw included) allows different types of weights to be added if desired. Cosmetically and mechanically, the passives match the Designer Series line of drivers, with a poly coated paper cone and medium-roll rubber surround for clean excursion and long life. The possibilities with these passives are endless, from floor standing two-ways to small active/passive subwoofer systems. Recommended for use in passive radiator enclosure alignments with active drivers from 3" to 6.5" in diameter. Dual passive radiators are recommended for use with 6.5" active drivers. Specifications: • Fs: 24.5 Hz • Vas: 27.1 liters • Qms: 5.57 • Cms: 1.15 mm/N • Rms: 1 kg/s • Mms: 36.6 g • Sd: 128.7 sq. cm. • Xmax: 8 mm • Dimensions: Overall diameter: 176.28 mm, Cutout diameter: 143 mm, Depth: 47.75 mm Note: Adding mass to the passive radiator will decrease Fs and increase Qms. Tip: As a general rule the passive radiator(s) should be able to move double the volume of air as the active woofer(s)/subwoofer(s) in the system. For example: A passive radiator system for a 6-1/2" woofer/subwoofer that has 8mm of X-max would require 2-6-1/2" passive radiators with 8mm of X-max. For single passive radiator systems, it is common to use a passive that is larger than the active woofer(s)/subwoofer(s).
